metadata.reference: K. M. Islam, R. Synowicki, T. Ismael, I. Oguntoye, N. Grinalds, M. D. Escarra. In-plane and out-of-plane optical properties of monolayer, few-layer, and thin-film MoS2 from 190 to 1700 nm and their application in photonic device design. Adv. metadata.comments: Monolayer film (1L, step height 0.61 nm). In-plane (ordinary ray, o).
